title: tephroseris helenitis var. discoidea
intro: Tephroseris helenitis var. discoidea, also known as a type of Mountain Everlasting, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Tephroseris helenitis var. discoidea include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Tephroseris helenitis var. discoidea can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
